revision.comment: It is over-engineered, but fully compatible with the other namespace detection templates.
Protected Template:Talk other: This is a meta-template, the moment it is used it becomes high-risk. [edit=sysop:move=sysop]
Added {{pp-template|small=yes}}.
Removing the "return 'talk'/'other' when no parameter" function, since not used, not needed and causes problems in some situations.
This template has now been checked and tested, it works correctly in the new "Book:" and "Book talk:" namespaces. And a minor update to "{{pp-template}}".
remove {{pp-template}}
remove comment

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
